steps.title: Read the two wages
steps.content: The table shows a wage of $1.00$ in $1960$ and a wage of $1.50$ in $1970$. The original value is the $1960$ wage.

steps.title: Compute the percent increase
steps.content: Percent increase compares the change to the original value: $$ \frac{1.50-1.00}{1.00}\cdot100\%=50\% $$ The answer is B.
